reviews.originalComment: suasana hotel tepat dipinggir pantai menambah suasana  semakin indah dan tenang apalagi mendengar suara deburan ombak yg menghempas pantai, hotelnya bersih dan harum semua perlengkapan rapi dan bersih, saya pesan kamr deluxe alhamdulillah dpt yg family room dan tanpa nambah biaya extra bed , pelayanannya jg ok , bebas ambil air minum dingin atau panas.pokonya lain wkt kita nginap disini lg .
reviews.reviewComments: The atmosphere of the hotel right by the beach adds to the beauty and tranquility, especially listening to the sound of the waves crashing on the shore. The hotel is clean and fragrant, with all the amenities neat and tidy. I booked a deluxe room and thankfully received a family room without having to pay for an extra bed. The service was good as well, with free access to cold or hot drinking water. Overall, we will definitely stay here again next time.
reviews.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.originalComment: Kamar menghadap laut ,bisa lihat sunrise ada jendelanya ,ada ayunannya ,nyaman banget
reviews.reviewComments: The room facing the sea has a window to see the sunrise, it has a swing, it's very comfortable.
reviews.roomTypeName: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi tepi laut, debur suara ombak buat tenang dan berasa banget lagi liburan. Tempatnya bersih dan nyaman, pemilik penginapan berada di  lokasi ramah dan informatif. Sukaaaaaaa
reviews.reviewComments: Seaside location, the sound of the waves is calming and feels like a real vacation. The place is clean and comfortable, the owners of the accommodation are friendly and informative. I love it!

reviews.reviewComments:
The bed is great

The location is great
Overall, it's great!

reviews.reviewTitle: Clean with an extraordinary sea view.
reviews.originalTitle: Bersih dengan pemandangan laut yg luar biasa
reviews.originalComment: Penginapan yang pemandangan nya langsung menuju lautan lepas yang sangat luar biasa bagus dengan angin sepoi-sepoi nya
reviews.reviewComments: Accommodations with a view directly overlooking the open sea that is extraordinarily beautiful with a gentle breeze.
